deep_dive.title: Multi-Dimensional Quality Assessment for AI-Generated Human-Centric Videos: Dataset and Model
deep_dive.abstract: AI-generated human-centric videos play a crucial role in a wide range of modern applications. However, they often suffer from quality issues and semantic mismatches, underscoring the importance of effective quality assessment for such videos. To this end, we extend our previous dataset HVEval with pairwise preference annotations, resulting in HVEval+, the largest holistic quality assessment dataset for AI-generated human-centric videos, which comprises 1k prompts based on a comprehensive taxonomy, 20k videos generated by 24 text-to-video (T2V) models, and extensive human annotations, including 60k mean opinion scores (MOSs) and 60k preference pairs across 3 dimensions (i.e., spatial quality, temporal quality, and text-video correspondence), as well as 20k category-specific question-answer (Q&A) pairs. Along with the HVEval+ dataset, we further propose MoE-Rater, a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-inspired and multimodal large language model (MLLM)-based all-in-one method that supports multi-dimensional quality rating, multi-dimensional pairwise comparison, and category-specific question answering within a single model. Specifically, we introduce Mixture of Projector Experts (MoPE) and Mixture of LoRA Experts (MoLE), together with a three-stage training strategy consisting of task-aware pre-training, task-specific adaptation, and adaptive routing optimization, to effectively unify multiple tasks, resulting in superior performance on both HVEval+ and Human-AGVQA datasets. Extensive experiments and comprehensive analysis demonstrate the significant potential of the HVEval+ dataset and the MoE-Rater method in advancing AI-generated video quality assessment and further facilitating the evaluation and optimization of T2V models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: multi-dimensional quality assessment dataset and model for AI-generated videos
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 面向AI生成视频的多维度质量评估数据集与模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 面向AI生成视频的多维度质量评估数据集与模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 面向AI生成视频的多维度质量评估数据集与模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: HVEval+ extends prior dataset with pairwise preferences, providing 20k videos from 24 T2V models annotated with MOS and preferences across spatial, temporal, and text-video alignment dimensions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: AI生成人体中心视频存在质量问题和语义偏差，亟需有效的质量评估。本文在HVEval基础上扩展得到HVEval+，包含1k个提示词、20k个视频和60k条主观评分及偏好对，覆盖空间质量、时间质量和文本-视频一致性三个维度。该数据集为视频生成模型评估提供了全面的基准。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: AI生成人体中心视频存在质量问题和语义偏差，亟需有效的质量评估。本文在HVEval基础上扩展得到HVEval+，包含1k个提示词、20k个视频和60k条主观评分及偏好对，覆盖空间质量、时间质量和文本-视频一致性三个维度。该数据集为视频生成模型评估提供了全面的基准。

quick_skim.title: Thinking in Video: Can Video Generators Really Reason About the Real World?
quick_skim.abstract: Recent advances in world models and video generation have given rise to an emerging reasoning paradigm that leverages video generative models to simulate, predict, and reason about real-world dynamics. We redefine this paradigm as Thinking in Video, where video is not merely an output artifact but a medium for constructing, extending, and verifying causal thought. However, this promise remains unverified: convincing rollouts may reflect memorized appearances rather than causal understanding, while existing metrics separate perceptual fidelity from semantic logic. To evaluate whether video generators support such reasoning, we introduce the Causal-Generative Dual-Judge (CGDJ), auditing World Model Consistency from two perspectives. Explicit Causal Perception tests whether a generator reads a video scenario as a reasoning problem through spatio-temporal flattened visual question answering, while Implicit Generative Perception-Prediction Gap evaluates whether it renders the causal consequence as a consistent future video. Applying CGDJ to representative open- and closed-source generators reveals a clear Perception-Prediction Gap: open-source models produce plausible dynamics despite near-zero explicit causal perception, whereas advanced closed-source systems show stronger but still limited alignment between reasoning and generation. Further analysis exposes audio-visual misalignment, where models verbalize correct causal logic more reliably than they render it, challenging the "world simulator" narrative.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: evaluation metric (CGDJ) for video generation models' world model reasoning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用于评估视频生成模型世界模型推理能力的评价指标（CGDJ）
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用于评估视频生成模型世界模型推理能力的评价指标（CGDJ）
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用于评估视频生成模型世界模型推理能力的评价指标（CGDJ）
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CGDJ (Causal-Generative Dual-Judge) evaluates video generators' world model consistency from causal and generative perspectives, revealing gaps in reasoning ability.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 视频生成模型能否真正推理现实世界因果尚待验证。本文提出因果-生成双重评判（CGDJ）指标，从显式因果和生成一致性两个角度审计世界模型的一致性。实验发现现有视频生成器在因果推理上存在显著不足。该指标为视频生成模型的语义推理评估提供了新范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 视频生成模型能否真正推理现实世界因果尚待验证。本文提出因果-生成双重评判（CGDJ）指标，从显式因果和生成一致性两个角度审计世界模型的一致性。实验发现现有视频生成器在因果推理上存在显著不足。该指标为视频生成模型的语义推理评估提供了新范式。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: metrics for evaluating video generation models

quick_skim.title: SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis
quick_skim.abstract: Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable code for pedagogical animations using libraries such as Manim. However, ensuring spatial correctness and visual legibility remains challenging, as existing frameworks emphasize pedagogical content while overlooking geometric occlusions. We propose the Symbolic Geometric Agent (SGA), a plug-and-play module for code-centric animation pipelines that intercepts LLM-generated code, performs partial execution to extract symbolic scene graphs, and applies targeted refinement when spatial conflicts are detected. We further introduce the Manim Visual Quality Score (MVQS), a deterministic rendering-free proxy for spatial integrity. Experiments on the MMMC-Code benchmark across four LLM backbones and two agentic pipelines show that SGA achieves a peak MVQS of 73.11 (Code2Video + GPT-5.1), corresponding to a 16.1% relative improvement over the raw baseline, and improves MVQS in 7 of 8 backbone x pipeline configurations.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: introduces Manim Visual Quality Score (MVQS) for assessing spatial integrity of generated videos
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提出Manim视觉质量分数用于评估生成视频的空间完整性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提出Manim视觉质量分数用于评估生成视频的空间完整性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提出Manim视觉质量分数用于评估生成视频的空间完整性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SGA module and MVQS metric to detect and quantify spatial occlusion errors in LLM-generated educational animations, enabling automated quality assessment without rendering.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有LLM生成教育动画常忽略空间正确性，导致遮挡错误。本文提出符号几何智能体SGA，通过部分执行提取场景图并修正冲突，同时引入Manim视觉质量分数MVQS作为无渲染代理指标。实验证明该方法能显著提升动画的空间完整性，并提供自动化的质量评估手段。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有LLM生成教育动画常忽略空间正确性，导致遮挡错误。本文提出符号几何智能体SGA，通过部分执行提取场景图并修正冲突，同时引入Manim视觉质量分数MVQS作为无渲染代理指标。实验证明该方法能显著提升动画的空间完整性，并提供自动化的质量评估手段。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: video quality assessment methods for generated videos
